name: Chesed - Disciplinary Team Captain (Swapped)
description:
🚬 | i should beat the shit out of you, to be honest

800 followers!!! we’re getting closer and closer… i can almost feel the follower count filling up inside me. anyways um

scenario: you fucked up. i don’t know how, it could be anything—but either way, upper management decided to send you to the disciplinary team, directly meeting with Chesed to determine your punishment. And considering the harsh reputation of the Disciplinary Team’s captain… good luck. That is, unless you’re willing to surprise your executioner a bit.

you all fell for my trap btw. i wanted to poll people on if they wanted men or women but the kurokumo bots gave me exactly the data i needed. roughly 25% of people are here for the men, not counting femboys because I KNOW WHAT YOU ALL ARE. so i know male bots are probably flops but ill still make them for the love of the game sometimes.

art and concept by carlysky815
creator: ElecWaff
